text.title: Linear Issue Tracking (PM Agile) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Linear Issue Tracking (PM Agile).

example.scenario: 5-person remote team adopting Linear. 2-week cycle, 6-state workflow, 8 labels (bug/feat/chore/spike/docs/infra/p0/p1), GitHub + Slack + Calendar integrations on, points estimation. Spec lives at /docs/linear-policy.md and is reviewed quarterly.
